function.name: logNewMemberInquiry
function.description: Use this when a caller is not in the system (new member), calls after hours and can't be booked live, or is missing a card on file. Logs them to the dashboard and immediately texts the front desk so no one gets missed.

service_interest.description: What they want to book, e.g. '60-min Deep Tissue' — leave blank if they didn't say

reason.description: new_member = not in system and needs account setup; after_hours = office is closed; card_required = member but no card on file

notes.description: Any other details — therapist preference, gender preference, timing, anything useful for the front desk
